title: Color
description: A canonical color in the oklch space (W3C CSS Color 4). This is the STRUCTURE; the atom serializes to the string oklch(l% c h / alpha). Optional params are explicit — alpha is always present (no implicit 1). Normalizing to oklch is normalizing to the standard, and it dedupes colors by MEANING (rgb()/hex/hsl/oklch of one color → one atom).

c.description: chroma, >= 0 (roughly 0–0.37 within sRGB; unbounded for wide gamut).

alpha.description: opacity — REQUIRED (explicit optional param, no implicit default).
